name: hunter-pipeline
description: Opportunity-to-launch pipeline: signal scan, decision log, persona extract, offer scope, pitch, and deploy — chained through typed envelopes with Obsidian vault persistence.
author: Peleke Sengstacke

packages.name: hunter-core
packages.description: Core pipeline: signal-scan → decision-log → persona-extract → swot-analysis → offer-scope → pitch

packages.name: hunter-deploy
packages.description: Output and deployment skills: slidev decks, landing pages, one-pagers, design passes, vault persistence

packages.name: hunter-research
packages.description: Research and harvesting skills: Reddit scraping, wild pain-quote scanning, quote-to-persona bridging

packages.name: hunter-content
packages.description: Content planning and LinkedIn distribution via LinWheel integration

packages.name: hunter-community
packages.description: Community platform planning: paid community design with Skool integration
